name: KAWASAN INDUS. JABABEKA TBK,PTR
summary: PT Kawasan Industri Jababeka Tbk develops and manages industrial estates, providing infrastructure and support services to companies operating within its estates in Indonesia; they offer land plots, ready-built factories, and commercial properties, along with utilities, security, and waste management. The company also develops residential and commercial properties in its estates. PT Kawasan Industri Jababeka Tbk is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia.
